findings: stuck alert is based only on claimed task mtime >120s and ignores heartbeats/result-write progress, so healthy long-running metaswarm work can false-positive as stuck
alert dedupe uses substring matching on task ids, so overlapping ids can suppress or misattribute alerts
orphan recovery only requeues when live_agents == 0, leaving a dead worker's claimed task stuck if any other agent remains alive
tmux pane census is treated as authoritative without robust failure handling, so tmux lookup failure can force live_agents to 0 and trigger wrong orphan recovery
all-agents-dead path does not terminate cleanly when no results exist, risking an infinite loop with a negative countdown
